channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate committee advances Markwayne Mullin’s nomination for Homeland Security despite bipartisan opposition
item.description: A U.S. Senate committee has narrowly advanced the nomination of Senator Markwayne Mullin to become Secretary of Homeland Security, sending his candidacy to a full Senate vote. The decision followed an...

item.title: CAF Reverses CAN 2025 Final Result: Senegal vs Morocco Controversy
item.description: On 17th March 2026, the African Football Confederation (CAF) Appeal Jury officially changed the result of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations (CAN) final. Originally, Senegal had beaten Morocco 1-0 after e...

item.title: Tinubu discusses terrorism and climate change challenges during UK visit
item.description: President Bola Tinubu of Nigeria dey for UK for him state visit, and him talk say Nigeria dey face wahala from terrorism and wahala wey come from climate change. Na first time in 37 years wey Nigeria ...

item.title: Migori Woman Mourns Husband and Son Following Violent Incident
item.description: A family in Nyabohanse, Migori county is in deep mourning after losing their son, Brian Marwa, who was reportedly stabbed to death on Wednesday night, March 18. The tragedy came just a day after the f...

item.title: IIT JAM 2026 Results Declared By IIT: How To Access Your Scorecard Online
item.description: The Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs) have officially released the results of the Joint Admission Test for Masters (IIT JAM) 2026. Candidates who appeared for this national-level entrance examina...

item.title: Footballer Maruti files defamation suit against Owalo over social media post
item.description: The article reports on a legal dispute in Kenya where a footballer identified as Maruti has taken legal action against Owalo over a social media post that he claims damaged his reputation. The story e...

item.title: Design and Safety of Modern Buhurt Armor for Full-Contact Medieval Combat
item.description: Full-contact medieval combat, or buhurt, requires specialized protective equipment designed to handle repeated steel-to-steel strikes and grappling maneuvers. Modern buhurt armor integrates three main...

item.title: CDF Field Marshal Asim Munir warns against violence triggered by foreign incidents during meeting with Ahl-e-Tasheeh ulema

item.title: MEA Announces Plans to Diversify LPG Imports Including from Russia Amid Middle East Energy Disruptions
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) has stated that India is actively working to source liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from multiple global suppliers to secure energy needs amid escalating tensions ...

item.title: Wike Says Tinubu’s Reelection in Abuja Looks Strong Due to Infrastructure Projects

item.title: Guvna B discusses his journey with pornography addiction and recovery in new album
item.description: British rapper Guvna B, whose real name is Isaac Borquaye, opens up about his personal struggles in a candid interview following the release details of his tenth studio album, This Bed I Made. After a...

item.title: Climate change, cassava and disease: how Africa’s key root crop is facing new risks
item.description: This article explains how climate change is reshaping the future of cassava, one of Africa’s most important staple crops and a key safety net for more than 800 million people worldwide. Cassava, a har...

item.title: Russian oil shipment of 7.7 lakh barrels expected to reach India by 21 March
item.description: A large Russian oil tanker transporting around 7.7 lakh barrels of crude oil is scheduled to reach India on 21 March. The arrival highlights India’s continued engagement with Moscow in the energy sect...

item.title: Karachi Faces Continued Rain and Strong Winds, 19 Dead in Recent Storm
item.description: KARACHI: Karachi witnessed a severe thunderstorm late Wednesday night, causing widespread damage and loss of life. At least 19 people died due to rain-related incidents, including collapsed walls and ...

item.title: Chalmers outlines budget priorities amid economic and global challenges
item.description: Treasurer Jim Chalmers is preparing the May 12 budget amid growing economic uncertainty exacerbated by the worsening Middle East conflict. The conflict has driven up global fuel prices, particularly d...

item.title: Kenya Faces Deadline to Pay AFCON 2027 Hosting Fee or Risk Losing Hosting Rights
item.description: Kenya's hosting of the 2027 Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) is facing uncertainty after Sports Principal Secretary Elijah Mwangi disclosed that the country has not yet paid the Ksh 3.9 billion (USD 30 m...

item.title: Tanzania Government to Address Tax Challenges in 2026/27 Budget
item.description: The Tanzanian government has promised to address the tax challenges faced by traders and industrialists in the upcoming 2026/27 budget. Deputy Minister of Finance, Laurent Luswetula, spoke to members ...

item.title: Ofcom Fines 4chan £450,000 for Lack of Age Verification to Prevent Children's Access to Pornography
item.description: On March 19, 2026, the UK regulator Ofcom imposed a £450,000 fine on the controversial American online forum 4chan for failing to implement age checks to prevent children from accessing pornography on...
